case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A), N.A. VS. JOSHUA R KOLB ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A), N.A.
